Home › PDF tools › Rotate PDF

Rotate PDF pages

Turn pages 90°, 180° or 270°, all or a range.

Files stay on your device. No accounts. Free.

Loading tool...

About this tool

Fix scans that came in sideways or upside down: pick an angle, choose all pages or a range like 1-3,5, and download the corrected PDF. The rotation is written into the page properties, so quality is untouched.

Rotation runs on pdf-lib inside your browser. Nothing is re-rendered and nothing is uploaded; a 200-page document rotates in a couple of seconds.

How it works

  1. Drop your file(s), they are read locally on your device.
  2. Set the options you need and run the tool.
  3. Download the finished PDF, images or text.

Frequently asked questions

Does rotating reduce the quality of my PDF?

No. The tool changes each page's rotation property rather than re-rendering anything, so text stays selectable and images keep every pixel.

Can I rotate just one page in the middle of the document?

Yes. Type the page numbers the way you would in a print dialog, for example 3 or 2-5,8, and only those pages turn.

My scan is rotated in some viewers but not others. Why?

Some scanners store the rotation as a hint that certain viewers ignore. Rotating here writes the orientation into the page itself, which every viewer respects.

Related tools

  • Image Rotator - Fix sideways photos in exact 90° steps.
  • Split PDF - Extract pages or ranges into separate PDFs.
  • Merge PDF - Combine multiple PDFs, in the order you choose.
